div1.entryFree:
Determinate, adj. 1) limited, fixed: my bonds in thee are all d. Sonn. 87, 4.* my d. voyage is mere extravagancy, Tw. II, 1, 11.
2) decisive: ere a d. resolution, he did require a respite, H8 II, 4, 176. unless his abode be lingered by some accident: wherein none can be so d. as the removing of Cassio, Oth. IV, 2, 232.
